text.hero-h1: Intelligence Applied to Real Problems.
text.hero-sub: Data Scientist and ML enthusiast based in Malaysia. I leverage high-performance resources and predictive modeling to build end-to-end solutions.
text.contact-text: I'm always open to interesting collaborations, idea sharing, or just a good conversation about technology and sustainability
text.contact-quote: The world doesn't reward potential, it rewards audacity

projects.title: Easy-Update Personal Portfolio Website
projects.desc: A streamlined personal website hosted on GitHub designed for quick content updates. It uses an automated setup that pushes changes live instantly whenever a file is edited, removing the need for manual deployment or complex coding.

projects.title: Agribuddy (YSEALI Seeds for the Future 2025)
projects.desc: An AI-powered crop management platform designed to help Malaysian farmers optimize yields and adopt sustainable practices. The project combines a mobile application with data-driven tools and hands-on training to simplify digital transformation in local farming communities.

achievements.title: Hackathon Winner — HackSG 2023
achievements.desc: First place in a 48-hour national hackathon with 150+ competing teams.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Developer – Associate
achievements.desc: Certified in cloud architecture, serverless computing, and deploying scalable applications on AWS.

achievements.title: The Most Innovative Idea
achievements.desc: A high-impact project that me and my team created that is recognized for its creative approach to regional challenges during the YSEALI Bootcamp. It focuses on practical, scalable solutions and earned the "Most Innovative Idea" title for its unique integration of technology and community-driven impact.

achievements.title: YSEALI Seeds for the Future 2025 Grant Recipient
achievements.desc: A grant-funded project focused on regional development and social impact. Our project (Agribuddy) involved coordinating with multiple partners and volunteers to hit key milestones, ultimately delivering measurable outcomes for youth leaders and local beneficiaries within the community.
